---
title: "Jason H. Nicholson"
---

This is the webpage of Jason H. Nicholson. It's a blog and specific pages focused on engineering, math, computer science, and physics.

There is a [blog](blog.qmd). There several special interest pages such as Numerical Methods, System Identification, and more. My [About](about.qmd) page has several outside links.

You can find the source code at [https://github.com/jasonnicholson/jasonnicholson.github.io](https://github.com/jasonnicholson/jasonnicholson.github.io). If the domain is ever lost or not working, [https://jasonnicholson.github.io](https://jasonnicholson.github.io) should still work.
